About.heroText1: Welcome to Tabeeby, your trusted partner in managing your healthcare needs conveniently and efficiently. At Tabeeby, we understand the challenges individuals face when it comes to scheduling doctor appointments and managing their health records.
About.heroText2: Tabeeby is committed to excellence in healthcare technology. We continuously strive to enhance our platform, integrating the latest advancements to improve user experience and deliver superior service. Whether you're booking your first appointment or managing ongoing care, Tabeeby is here to support you every step of the way.
About.visionText: Our vision at Tabeeby is to create a seamless healthcare experience for every user. We aim to bridge the gap between patients and healthcare providers, making it easier for you to access the care you need, when you need it.

features.efficiencyText: Streamlined appointment scheduling that fits into your busy lifestyle without any hassle.
features.convenienceText: Access to a network of trusted healthcare professionals right in your area, anytime.
features.personalizationText: Tailored recommendations and smart reminders to help you stay on top of your health.

brand.description: Tabeeby makes it easy to find trusted, certified doctors and book appointments online — anytime, anywhere. Your health is our priority, and we’re here to connect you with the right care, hassle-free.
